Interface IGeodatabaseRelease4

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that provide information about the release version of a geodatabase.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("8E602B66-BE7F-4D4E-9340-50DF434480AD")]
public interface IGeodatabaseRelease4 : IGeodatabaseRelease3, IGeodatabaseRelease2, IGeodatabaseRelease

GeodatabaseCurrent

Indicates if the geodatabase system tables are at the current release level.

bool GeodatabaseCurrent { get; }

bool
